hero.tagline: I make sites, tools, and experiments out of curiosity and enjoyment of the process.
hero.description: This space collects open source projects and visual studies I have been building in my spare time, usually mixing web, interface work, and technical exploration.

about.title: About
about.description: Software Engineer focused on Frontend with experience spanning Web, Data, and IoT. I build efficient solutions with clean code and solid architecture.

projects.title: Open Source Projects
projects.intro: A selection of open source projects I have been building and refining through curiosity, usefulness, and a fondness for interface work.
projects.aurawall: Abstract wallpaper generator with gesture support and dynamic color systems.
projects.personalnews: Privacy-focused news aggregator with clean design and local-first AI support.
projects.spread: Tool for creating and sharing visually rich content cards.
projects.imaginizim: Client-side image optimizer focused on performance and privacy.
projects.fremit: Code mockup editor with theme support and high-resolution export.
projects.markLee: Desktop Markdown editor focused on flow, real-time preview, and polished PDF export.
projects.kaesKeideInspector: Browser extension for inspecting CSS, HTML, accessibility, assets, and the full technology stack of any site.

activity.title: Coding Pulse
activity.subtitle: Recent public GitHub events and a few repositories I still keep tinkering with as a hobby.

activity.empty: No recent events at the moment.
activity.runtimeIntro: Tools and infrastructure currently powering this site.

techStack.title: Tech Stack
techStack.description: A few areas and tools I tend to explore whenever I am building things for my own interest.
techStack.introText: I prefer readable interfaces, systems that stay easy to evolve, and tooling that never gets in the way of shipping. The stack serves the product, not the reverse.

performance.title: Performance with intent
performance.description: Optimization starts early to preserve flow, not as a late patch.

clarity.title: Interface clarity
clarity.description: Hierarchy, contrast, and language should remove real friction.

delivery.title: Delivery that scales
delivery.description: I structure code and tooling so the project stays malleable after v1.

frontend.label: Interface
frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.summary: Web experiences with visual rhythm, responsiveness, and predictable engineering.

backend.label: Services
backend.title: Backend
backend.summary: APIs and data layers with simple modeling, observability, and low operational drag.

systems.label: Low level
systems.title: Systems
systems.summary: Rust, embedded work, and hardware-facing experiments when the problem needs proximity to the system.

tools.label: Delivery
tools.title: Tools
tools.summary: Build, automation, and environment tooling that reduce the gap between idea, iteration, and deploy.

footer.tagline: A place to gather interfaces, tools, and experiments I have made over time.
footer.philosophy: I believe in a free and accessible web for all.
